description: Compositions:Brown leather bag with simple metal, button and stitch detailingSheek thread stitch in inverted V with metal buttons on this stylish brown leather bag from murcia is an attention catcher. It has two roomy compartments to help you sort and store your belongings to suit your convenience. Sling this with its broad leather handles and make heads turn.Bag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a mild leather cleaner
